'''Endoraan''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that was an endpoint of the [[Relgim Run/Legends|Relgim Run]], opposite [[Mantooine/Legends|Mantooine]].<ref name="TEA" />

After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] and the defeat of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the world remained under the control of Grand Moff [[Ardus Kaine]] and his [[Pentastar Alignment]] and later the [[Imperial Remnant]] under Admiral [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]].<ref name="TEA" />

{{Planet-stub}}
